title: centaurea × guichardii
intro: Centaurea × guichardii, a perennial flower, is a hybrid of the knapweed and meadow knapweed plants, known for its vibrant purple flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Consuming Centaurea × guichardii is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting digestion. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
